case_title: KLEIN, NORMAN VS JOLLY, ANGELA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,041.00 FILED BY KLEIN, NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT JOLLY, ANGELA MIDGLEY, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIDGLEY, STEVE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-10-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-31-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT JOLLY, ANGELA WAIVES NO SERVICE. CONTINUED PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. PLAINTIFF DISMISSED CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT MIDGLEY, STEVE WITH PREJUDICE.
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT MIDGLEY, STEVE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-01-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMT OF $1460, IF DEFT PAYS BALANCE BY 10/31/05 & FOR A TOTAL AMT OF $1,710 IF PAID NO LATER THAN 11/30/05 IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO ANGELA JOLLY RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-01-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-06-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLEIN, NORMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOLLY, ANGELA $1,710.00 PRINCIPAL, $101.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,811.50, DEFENDANT DID NOT FOLLOW THROUGH WITH THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO ANGELA JOLLY OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $391.66 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLEIN, NORMAN
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT JOLLY, ANGELA HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ANGELA JOLLY (888 BRANNAN ST #196, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
